commit.message:
fix(pihole): remove drop:ALL, keep default root capabilities

Pi-hole FTL needs DAC_OVERRIDE, FOWNER, CHOWN, SETGID, SETUID and
more to manage its log files and pid files. The network namespace
enforces privileged PSA so keeping default root capabilities is
safe and avoids capability whack-a-mole.

fix: tag ALL instruments as UADEEditableSynth in injectUADE path

When injectUADE is true, UADE handles all audio — native parser instruments
are only for pattern display metadata. Previously only instrument[0] was
tagged, leaving the rest as generic 'Synth' which could produce unwanted
basic synth audio instead of silence. Now all instruments are tagged as
UADEEditableSynth, ensuring the singleton dedup in ToneEngine creates only
one UADESynth instance while the replayer's suppressNotes prevents any
individual note triggers.

Fixes MFP (Magnetic Fields Packer) which uses basic synth waveforms —
its 31 instruments were playing through the default Synth engine instead
of being suppressed in favor of UADE audio.

commit.message:
Copilot/update code using design docs (#4)

* Initial plan

* Refactor to new layered architecture

Introduce a layered module structure under lib/src/:

- error/: typed exception hierarchy (FlacMetadataException,
  InvalidFlacException, MalformedMetadataException, etc.) with
  FlacCorruptHeaderException as a backward-compatible alias

- model/: immutable domain model — FlacMetadataBlock abstract base,
  concrete block types (StreamInfoBlock, VorbisCommentBlock, PictureBlock,
  PaddingBlock, ApplicationBlock, SeekTableBlock, CueSheetBlock,
  UnknownBlock), value types (VorbisComments/VorbisCommentEntry,
  PictureType enum, FlacBlockType enum), FlacMetadataDocument

- binary/: byte-level I/O — ByteReader, ByteWriter, FlacParser
  (returns FlacMetadataDocument), FlacSerializer

- edit/: mutation API — sealed MetadataMutation hierarchy,
  FlacMetadataEditor, PaddingStrategy

- transform/: FlacTransformer, FlacTransformPlan/Result/Options

- api/: top-level convenience functions (readFlacMetadata,
  applyMutations, transformFlac)

Remove old flat files (models.dart, flac_parser.dart, flac_editor.dart,
vorbis_comment_processor.dart, picture_block_processor.dart).

Update lib/dart_metaflac.dart to export all new symbols.
Update bin/metaflac.dart and all 4 test files to use the new API.

All 25 tests pass.

commit.message:
fix(pihole): add DNSMASQ_USER=root to prevent FTL capability error

Pi-hole v6 FTL tries to set CAP_SETFCAP before dropping to non-root,
which fails in a Kubernetes security context. Setting DNSMASQ_USER=root
keeps FTL running as root and bypasses the capability elevation.

fix: use UADEEditableSynth for injectUADE formats to connect audio graph

When withNativeThenUADE(injectUADE: true) is used, the native parser may
return instruments with generic 'Synth' synthType. NativeEngineRouting
requires at least one instrument with 'UADEEditableSynth' synthType to
pre-create the synth instance and connect the UADE audio output to the
main audio bus.

- Changed zero-instruments fallback from 'UADESynth' to 'UADEEditableSynth'
- Added else branch: when native parser returns instruments but none are
  UADEEditableSynth, tag instrument[0] with the correct synthType

  formats using injectUADE path where native parser provides instruments

commit.message:
Initial release: spike3 library + hardware simulator + TUI dashboard

Reverse-engineered Python communication library for LEGO SPIKE 3 hubs.

Features:
- Full Atlantis binary protocol (USB serial + BLE)
- Modified COBS codec (verified against JS source)
- 71 Hub methods, 38 tunnel command builders
- 8 device notification parsers (IMU, motors, color, distance, force, matrix)
- Motor/LED/sound/tank drive control via scratch tunnel
- File upload/download with CRC32 validation
- 20-slot program storage

Simulator:
- 8 simulated device types with physics engine (100Hz)
- Virtual COM port (PTY) + TCP bridge + BLE peripheral
- 32 scratch.* tunnel handlers, 16 Atlantis message handlers
- Interactive CLI with 18 commands
- Rich Textual TUI dashboard with live visualization
- 5 scenario presets, event recording/replay
- 24/24 integration tests passing
